description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ubuntu:20.04 Docker image and defines a single build stage. Define a job named build:website in the build stage that runs a before_script calling $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.gitlab-ci/before_script.sh, then executes the main script $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.gitlab-ci/script.sh, and finally runs an after_script $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.gitlab-ci/after_script.sh. Configure a cache keyed by $CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG that stores the node_modules/ and vendor/ruby/ directories. Set the variables DEPLOY_DIR_PRODUCTION as /var/www/hugo.pro and DEPLOY_DIR_STAGING as /var/www/hugo.pro_staging for use in deployment steps.
